name: config_edit
description: Read or modify Pi-Chi config files (brain config, .env, systemd units)

action.description: Action: 'read' to show file, 'get' to get a key value, 'set' to change a key value

key.description: Config key name (for get/set). Use 'none' for read.

value.description: New value (for set). Use 'none' for read/get.
